Our Services

Professional tree-service solutions for every need

Safe Tree Removal

Precision removal for hazardous or unwanted trees without damaging your property.

Learn More →

Complete Stump Removal

Thorough stump elimination that prevents regrowth and landscaping issues.

Learn More →

Expert Tree Pruning

Health-focused pruning that enhances tree structure and beauty.

Learn More →

24/7 Storm Response

Rapid response to storm-damaged trees threatening homes or power lines.

Learn More →

Strategic Tree Planting

Right tree, right place - expert species selection and planting.

Learn More →
Onyx Tree Service

Trusted tree service professionals serving Charlotte, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
